source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/DHF DMR/10. 설계변경 문서/(A-TCF-5-019-A-038) 2G, 3G用 Deco Sheet 변경 요청 件_2024.08.30/설계변경 문서/첨부문서/A1717MCW_BOM(UBCARE).xlsx

sourceSummary.oneLine: BOM listing for A1717MCW / 2G 1717 detector assemblies, deco sheet, covers, electronics, packing, and accessory set components.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports design history or manufacturing documentation by identifying product structure, part numbers, specifications, units, and required quantities for the listed assemblies.
keyPoints: Top-level item is 1717_UBCARE_DECO_SHEET with product number MSH-200008 and specification 2G_1717_DECO_SHEET.
A1717MCW_ASSY is listed as assembly ASM-200003 with specification 2G_A1717MCW_ASSY.
The BOM includes detector panel, CsI, thallium iodide, sealant, PBA, ROIC, CPLD, adhesive, tape, cover, harness, network, battery, charger, packing, and accessory items.

entities.name: Thallium Iodide
entities.evidence: 01-3-01-01-4 Thallium Iodide M20R2-001 Thallium Iodide(99.999%),beads G 10

concepts.name: Detector battery
concepts.evidence: 01-5-04 BATTERY-2G DETECTOR MI43-01011A ELT-3S1PA,Li-ion Pol EA 2

concepts.name: Detector charger
concepts.evidence: 01-5-09 CHARGER-2G MI44-01041A-D CHARGER-2G DETECTOR CHARGER;MSP-90W-12VC EA 1

evidence.claim: The source is a BOM continuous output document.
The top-level deco sheet item is 1717_UBCARE_DECO_SHEET, product number MSH-200008, specification 2G_1717_DECO_SHEET.
A1717MCW_ASSY is listed as assembly ASM-200003 with specification 2G_A1717MCW_ASSY.
The A1717MCW-MT process or subassembly is included with quantity EA 1.
The detector panel assembly includes HME(BOE)-1717-530N_NA_도 with dimensions 477(L) x 458(W) x 0.7(t), CsI 530 um, and Al Sheet.
Cesium Iodide is listed as material M20R1-001 with CsI purity specifications and total requirement KG 1.5.
Thallium Iodide is listed as material M20R2-001 with 99.999% beads specification and requirement G 10.
evidence.evidenceText: 01-3-01-01-4 Thallium Iodide M20R2-001 Thallium Iodide(99.999%),beads G 10

evidence.claim: The BOM includes rear cover assembly ASM-200001 for 2G_1717_REAR_COVER_ASSY.
The BOM includes middle block assembly ASM-200002 for 2G_1717_MIDDLE_BLOCK_ASSY.
The accessory set includes a 2G detector battery, part number MI43-01011A, specification ELT-3S1PA Li-ion Pol, quantity EA 2.
evidence.evidenceText: 01-5-04 BATTERY-2G DETECTOR MI43-01011A ELT-3S1PA,Li-ion Pol EA 2

evidence.claim: The accessory set includes a 2G detector charger, part number MI44-01041A-D, specification MSP-90W-12VC, quantity EA 1.
evidence.evidenceText: 01-5-09 CHARGER-2G MI44-01041A-D CHARGER-2G DETECTOR CHARGER;MSP-90W-12VC EA 1

evidence.claim: IEC60332-1 appears as a specification for HARNESS-SIGNAL part MI39-02330A.
